idea-plugin.name: BuildBell
idea-plugin.description:
BuildBell — Build Completion Sound Notifier


Never miss a build again. BuildBell plays a sound effect as soon as your Gradle build finishes, so you can stay focused on other tasks while waiting.

Features:
- Plays a success sound when the build passes.
- Plays a failure sound when the build fails.

Note: Make sure your speakers or headphones are connected and the volume is adjusted accordingly.
